name: permission-picker
note: CC permission picker (CRITICAL sample): Column + intrinsic + shrink ACTUAL overflow path. T-10 codex HIGH-2: prior viewport h=5 made remainder positive → triggered grow path, not shrink. Now h=3 → totalBasis=4 > viewport=3 → overflow=1; fractional shrink ratios (choice-1 + choice-2 each shrink=1) split overflow via Phase C truncation + leftover correction. choice-1 collapses to 0 height (cramped terminal hides one option). spec-1.1 carry-over: real CC uses absolute-positioned cursor over choices + scroll on overflow.
